pred_reason: The contract contains critical reentrancy vulnerabilities where external calls precede state updates, and lacks proper access controls allowing unauthorized execution of sensitive functions. Evidence: Withdraw function performs token transfer before updating state (Finding 1); Malicious ERC-20 tokens can exploit reentrancy via safeTransfer calls (Finding 2); Access control review identifies permission enforcement failures (Finding 6)

Evidence: Withdraw function performs token transfer before updating state (Finding 1); Malicious ERC-20 tokens can exploit reentrancy via safeTransfer calls (Finding 2); Access control review identifies permission enforcement failures (Finding 6)

llm_explanation.reason: The contract contains critical reentrancy vulnerabilities where external calls precede state updates, and lacks proper access controls allowing unauthorized execution of sensitive functions.
evidence: Withdraw function performs token transfer before updating state (Finding 1)
